creator: billsf@2600.COM
text:
"uath" driver does not work with Accton Technology products,
made for SMC Networks. (Common atleast in Europe.)

Fix: Use these diffs: (SMCWUSBT-G2 confirmed. SMCWUSB-G has the same chipset.)
How-To-Repeat: Plug in any USB WLAN made by Accton for SMC Networks with an
unpatched kernel. Will not attach
